Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating prediabetes, and slightly increased LDL cholesterol (109 mg/dL). Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend lifestyle modification and follow-up for glycemic control and cardiovascular risk assessment.
